## Kedgwick and Saint-Quentin New Brunswick

## Kedgwick and Saint-Quentin New Brunswick
The Restigouche West region, which includes Kedgwick and Saint-Quentin, is a natural gem nestled in the Appalachians, bordered by the Restigouche River and Mount Carleton. It offers breathtaking landscapes and a cultural richness bringing together Acadian heritage and First Nations traditions. Outdoor enthusiasts will find many activities such as salmon fishing and nature hiking. The local economy is mainly based on the forestry and tourism industries, with a growing emphasis on agriculture and small craft businesses.
